ValidationRule.description: Term dates are not allowed to overlap
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND(IP_Term1EndDate__c > IP_Term2StartDate__c,IP_Term1EndDate__c < IP_Term2EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term1EndDate__c > IP_Term3StartDate__c,IP_Term1EndDate__c < IP_Term3EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term1StartDate__c > IP_Term2StartDate__c,IP_Term1StartDate__c < IP_Term2EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term1StartDate__c > IP_Term3StartDate__c,IP_Term1StartDate__c < IP_Term3EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term2EndDate__c > IP_Term1StartDate__c,IP_Term2EndDate__c < IP_Term1EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term2EndDate__c > IP_Term3StartDate__c,IP_Term2EndDate__c < IP_Term3EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term2StartDate__c > IP_Term1StartDate__c,IP_Term2StartDate__c < IP_Term1EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term2StartDate__c > IP_Term3StartDate__c,IP_Term2StartDate__c < IP_Term3EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term3EndDate__c > IP_Term2StartDate__c,IP_Term3EndDate__c < IP_Term2EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term3EndDate__c > IP_Term1StartDate__c,IP_Term3EndDate__c < IP_Term1EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term3StartDate__c > IP_Term2StartDate__c,IP_Term3StartDate__c < IP_Term2EndDate__c), AND(IP_Term3StartDate__c > IP_Term1StartDate__c,IP_Term3StartDate__c < IP_Term1EndDate__c) )
